subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto him who hath won the lights of divine knowledge, when the All-Merciful came with a Cause whereat every idol lamented and all rejoiced [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن فاز بانوار العرفان اذ اتی الرحمن بامر ناح به کل صنم و استفرح کل
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @living waters; water of life
